heroHeadline: Ukraine Strikes Novorossiysk Black Sea Energy Hub, Expanding Campaign Beyond Oil Refineries
heroSubtitle: Kyiv hits Russian Black Sea energy terminal at Novorossiysk, broadening its sustained deep-strike campaign against Russian energy and logistics infrastructure
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
